items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding 'Allowed communication channels for minors'. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations that this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for this requirement, but there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that the system enforces or verifies allowed communication channels for minors, resulting in an inconclusive status.
